technicalArchitecture.database: Core Data (SQL-based, native) - RECOMMENDED FOR THIS PROJECT
technicalArchitecture.architecture_pattern: MVVM (ViewModel layer) - RECOMMENDED FOR THIS PROJECT
technicalArchitecture.testing_strategy: Rapid prototyping for now, but will be tested for Logic and UI as we reach milestones
technicalArchitecture.version_control: Git with branching strategy (main/dev) - RECOMMENDED FOR THIS PROJECT

metadata.nextTask: Task 1.7: Art Asset List & Production Breakdown (OPTIONAL)

technicalStack.database: Core Data (native iOS persistence, zero external dependencies)
technicalStack.cloudSync: CloudKit (Apple's native iCloud service, free tier available)

performance.appSize: Under 200 MB (fits easily on all devices)
performance.memoryFootprint: Under 150 MB (efficient, won't crash old devices)
performance.loadTime: Under 3 seconds from launch to playable

development.dependencies: None external (SwiftUI + SpriteKit + Core Data all native)
development.testing: Unit tests for economy/progression logic, UI tests for key screens

features.offlineFirst: Game works completely offline, no internet required
features.localization: Built-in support for multiple languages (English + future translations)

why: Native to iOS - zero external dependencies
Perfect for your creature/economy/progression data structure
Integrates seamlessly with CloudKit for iCloud sync
databaseChoice.alternative: Realm would be faster, but requires learning new syntax

why: Easy to test - business logic separated from UI
Claude Code will understand this pattern instantly

structure.Models: Creature, Monster, Habitat, Economy (from your design JSONs)

why: Easy to track changes and revert if needed

models.description: Data structures (will be auto-generated from your JSON design files)

benefits: Seamless sync across devices (if player has multiple iPhones/iPads)

phase2_milestone.unitTests: Economy logic, progression curves, breeding mechanics
phase2_milestone.uiTests: Creature purchasing, breeding flow, habitat expansion

graphics.animationFrameRate: 30 FPS for idle creatures (60 when interacting)
graphics.textureAtlasing: Group creature sprites into atlases for efficiency

memory.assetLoading: Load habitats on-demand, unload when switching
memory.cacheStrategy: Cache frequently-used creatures, purge old habitats
memory.targetMemory: Keep under 150 MB even with all creatures loaded

storage.appSize: Target under 200 MB (includes base assets, allows room for growth)
storage.coreDataSize: Optimize queries, prune old data periodically

localization.supportedLanguages: English (launch), prepared for: Spanish, French, German, Japanese

privacyAndSecurity.cloudKitBehavior: Player data encrypted in transit and at rest on iCloud
privacyAndSecurity.privacyPolicy: Simple: 'We only send crash reports to fix bugs'

automatedCodeGeneration: Swift Codable structures (from all design JSONs)

developmentTimeline.setup: 1 week - Xcode project, Core Data models, basic UI
developmentTimeline.coreFeatures: 4 weeks - Creatures, habitats, basic care mechanics
developmentTimeline.testing: 1 week - Bug fixes, optimization, quality pass
developmentTimeline.launch: 1 week - App Store submission, final polish
